_comment: Hestia governance hooks for the Codex CLI occupant. Codex loads hooks from a hooks.json OR inline [[hooks.EVENT]] tables in ~/.codex/config.toml; both use this event structure. Requires [features] codex_hooks = true. The PreToolUse gate is FAIL-CLOSED (Codex fails open) and covers the SHELL tool ONLY — the filesystem boundary for out-of-scope repos is the sandbox (sandbox_mode = workspace-write). Commands bake HESTIA_WORKSPACE because the gate's default (~/ai-workspace) is wrong on this host; observe/hydrate default CODEX_HOME to ~/.codex.
